description: Fix .prettierignore missing docs build artifacts and CONTRIBUTING.md inaccuracies. When a contributor runs npm run dev:docs or npm run build:docs, subsequent npm run format:check fails because docs/.next/, docs/.content-collections/, and docs/next-env.d.ts are not excluded from prettier. Also fix CONTRIBUTING.md's incorrect description of npm run type-check.

userStories.title: Add docs build artifacts to .prettierignore
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want npm run format:check to pass even when docs build artifacts exist so that running npm run check after npm run build:docs does not fail
acceptanceCriteria: `.prettierignore` includes `docs/.next` to exclude Next.js build output
`.prettierignore` includes `docs/next-env.d.ts` to exclude the auto-generated Next.js type file
userStories.notes:
The root `.prettierignore` at `.prettierignore` (10 lines) does not exclude docs build artifacts. The `docs/.gitignore` already excludes `.next/`, `.content-collections/`, and `next-env.d.ts` — but prettier doesn't read nested gitignore files. Add these three entries to the root `.prettierignore`:

```
docs/.next
docs/.content-collections
docs/next-env.d.ts
```

This is a 3-line addition to `.prettierignore`. No other files need to change.

userStories.title: Fix CONTRIBUTING.md type-check description inaccuracy
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want the command reference table in CONTRIBUTING.md to accurately describe what npm run type-check does so that I understand the build pipeline correctly
acceptanceCriteria: CONTRIBUTING.md line 102 no longer says `--noEmit` or `no file emission` for `npm run type-check`
The description accurately reflects that `npm run type-check` runs `tsc --build` which is an incremental build that emits files
userStories.notes:
In `CONTRIBUTING.md` around line 102, the command reference table says:

```
| `npm run type-check`       | TypeScript type checking (--noEmit, no file emission)           |
```

But `package.json` defines `type-check` as `tsc --build`, which DOES emit files (it's an incremental build). The description should say something like `TypeScript incremental build (same as tsc --build)` or `Incremental TypeScript compilation`. Also check that the rest of the table is accurate while there. The `npm run build` description says 'Production build (tsc + extension, incremental)' which is accurate.
